/usr/bin/ar qc libargussampleutils.a CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/ArgusHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/CommonOptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/EGLGlobal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/JPEGConsumer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/NativeBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/Observed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/Options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/RectUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/Thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/WindowBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/gtk/GuiElement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/gtk/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/CUDAHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/GLContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/PreviewConsumer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argussampleutils.dir/nvmmapi/NvNativeBuffer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libargussampleutils.a
